title: Rysons Tablet Crusher Grinder - Crushes Pills Tablets into Powder Easy for Kids
features: The tablet crusher transforms tablets to powder, making them easier to swallow.
Built in container for storing the crushed powder
Easy to Use in 2 Steps with transparent container to see all mill action
Step 1- Unscrew Crusher Cap and place table (s) into container and put the screw back
Step 2 - Turn the Crusher Cap Clock and Anti Clockwise to crush the table
description: Easy to use, durable tablet crusher with container is used to transform the tablets into powder. With easy clock and anti clockwise action the tablet crushes into soft and smooth powder.
